description.public: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a sharp, tearing beak.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} possesses a formidable bite of sharp teeth.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} bites with jaws wreathed in searing flame.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a limb of concentrated flame.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a bite dripping with dissolving acids.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a dripping limb of corrosive ichor.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} bites with jaws that crackle with storm energy.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a crackling limb of storm energy.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has elongated and sharpened claws.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has heavy, layered fur that blunts blows.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is enveloped by a fortified shell of elemental carapace which provides a defensive barrier.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a jointed external skeleton of hardened plates.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has long, piercing fangs.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} pounds its foes with massive fists.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a bite of numbing, merciless cold.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} swipes with an aqueous limb, frigid with cold.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is armored in thick external bone fused into a rigid shell.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an oversized beak that delivers shearing bites.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has formidable claws, each the size of a steel blade.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has cavernous jaws that engulf and crush its prey.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a trunk-thick tail that sweeps and slams.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a heavy, articulated shell which protects it from harm.
The @ref[actor.name]{construct} is encased in heavy armor plating.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a rough hide of thick and interlocking scales.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has heavy hooves that kick and trample anything underfoot.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a stout and wicked central horn with which it can gore its target.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with unseen limbs of raw kinetic force.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is protected by a flexible, chitinous shell.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has tough skin that turns aside glancing blows.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a short fur coat that softens impacts.
The @ref[actor.name]{construct} is protected by fitted armor plating.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s skin is covered in lightweight scales that provide protection without slowing it down.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} lashes out with a thorned length of razor-sharp black glass.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a diseased bite that festers and blights.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a rotting limb that seeps blight.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has crushing, snipping pincers.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} lashes out with an amorphous limb of slime.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a bite that wounds the mind more than the body.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a phantasmal limb that wounds the mind.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can launch a spray of barbed quills from its flanks.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} bites with jaws shining with searing light.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a limb of searing, luminous energy.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} bites with jaws of devouring darkness.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a limb of grasping darkness.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a barbed stinger which pierces flesh and injects venom.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has craggy, rock-like skin.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can lash out with its elongated, muscular tail.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has curved talons for gripping and rending prey.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks with writhing, grasping tentacles.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a thick, leathery hide that is resilient against attack.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has jutting tusks that rip and tear with each charging strike.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a bite that injects potent venom.
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} strikes with a toxin-slicked limb that poisons whatever it touches.
